summary: Solar energy project with subsidy information for Odisha state, including updated subsidy structure for 1kW, 2kW, and 3kW+ installations.
architectural_notes: Subsidy Structure (Odisha): 1kW=₹55,000 (Central ₹30,000 + State ₹25,000), 2kW=₹1,10,000 (Central ₹60,000 + State ₹50,000), 3kW+=₹1,38,000 max cap (Central ₹78,000 + State ₹60,000)

existing_features.title: Update the Odisha subsidy structure displayed in the OdishaGuide component to reflect the correct values: 1 kW = Central ₹30,000 + State ₹25,000 = Total ₹55,000; 2 kW = Central ₹60,000 + State ₹50,000 = Total ₹1,10,000; 3 kW+ = Central ₹78,000 + State ₹60,000 = Total ₹1,38,000 (Maximum cap). Ensure all three language variants (English, Hindi, Odia) in the translations file are updated consistently.
